SessionStart.command: sh -c 'command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && { if [ -n "$WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_ROOT" ]; then pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -File "$WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_ROOT/.github/scripts/session-cleanup-detector.ps1"; else printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_ROOT is not set. Set this env var to your local workflow-template repo path so the SessionStart hook can locate its scripts.\"}}"; fi } || echo {}'
SessionStart.windows: pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "if ($env:WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_ROOT) { & pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -File \"$($env:WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_ROOT)/.github/scripts/session-cleanup-detector.ps1\" } else { Write-Output '{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_ROOT is not set. Set this env var to your local workflow-template repo path so the SessionStart hook can locate its scripts.\"}}' }"
